pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh which downloads and writes to this path.
Verified from setup_task.sh download URL (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opengeos/data/main/raster/landsat.tif) and GDALMetadata tags confirming LANDSAT_LE7_TOA_5YEAR.

privileged_info_summary: The data file is a real Landsat satellite image (LANDSAT_LE7_TOA_5YEAR) downloaded from github.com/opengeos/data to /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. It contains multiple spectral bands (B1, B2, B3, B4).
